posts.title: Welcome to the Media Hub
posts.excerpt: This is the starter post for your new Netlify + CMS blog setup. Replace it anytime from /admin.
posts.author: Naphtali Bryant
posts.body:
## Your blog is now CMS-ready

This starter post lives inside `data/posts.json`, which means the site can load real content instead of relying only on browser storage.

### What to do next

- Log in at `/admin/`
- Edit this post or add a new one
- Publish changes through Netlify

### Why this is better

Your content can now be managed in one place and deployed with the rest of the site.

posts.title: How to Publish Your Next Post
posts.excerpt: A simple walk-through for adding titles, images, excerpts, and full article content using the new admin panel.
posts.author: Naphtali Bryant
posts.body:
## Publishing is simple

Open `/admin/`, sign in, and edit the **Posts Data** entry.

### Recommended workflow

1. Add a clear title
2. Write a short excerpt
3. Upload a featured image if needed
4. Paste the article body
5. Save and publish

Once Netlify rebuilds the site, the post should appear in the blog feed.
